column1: そのペンを使ってもかまいません。
column2: そのぺんをつかってもかまいません。
column3: It doesn't matter if you use that pen. / Feel free to use it.
column4: てもかまわない (it doesn't matter if / I don't mind if / it's okay to)
column5: Verb[て-form] + もかまわない / もかまいません
column6: granting permission or expressing indifference to whether an action occurs; 'feel free to / it's fine if you'
column8: てもかまわない = 'fine if you do' (permission/indifference); てもいい = same (slightly more common); てもよい = formal permission; てもかまわず = without minding (adverbial)
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:てもかまわない source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:top1k complexity:standard
